headline: Gen Digital Ruling And Trellis Deal Shift Risk And Growth Mix
summary: Gen Digital overturned a $481 million patent infringement award in a lawsuit brought by Columbia University, following a U.S. appeals court decision. The company also acquired Trellis, an insurance tech platform focused on AI driven personal insurance marketplaces. Both developments affect Gen Digital's legal risk profile and its push into embedded financial services. Gen Digital (NasdaqGS:GEN) is in focus after these two company level events, which arrive at a time when the stock trades...
